LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF RAYNE VAN KING'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO GENERAL FORM INTERROGATORIES, EMPLOYMENT FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS FROM DEFENDANTS STATE FARM LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY AND STATE FARM VP MANAGEMENT CORPORATION - NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE COURT ADOPTS THE RECOMMENDATION OF PRO TEM JUDGE WATSON AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. DISCLOSURE OF THE FACTS AND DOCUMENTS REGARDING MS. KING'S EMPLOYMENT, WHETHER IT BE SOLELY BY MR. WEITZEN OR ALSO BY STATE FARM, IS REASONABLY NECESSARY TO PERMIT THE PARTIES TO FULLY LITIGATE THE NATURE AND LEGAL STATUS OF HER EMPLOYMENT. THE ASSERTION OF AN ATTORNEY-CLIENT PRIVILEGE, WITHOUT A LOG OR OTHER SUPPORTING DATA, DOES NOT SUPPORT THE REFUSAL TO DISCLOSE INFORMATION OR DOCUMENTS. THE COURT ADDS THAT STATE FARM SHALL PRODUCE ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS AND A PRIVILEGE LOG FOR ALL DOCUMENTS WHERE ATTORNEY-CLIENT PRIVILEGE IS CLAIMED BY DECEMBER 20, 2012. MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

Plaintiff Rayne King'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To General Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Nov-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
Plaintiff Rayne Van King's Motion To Compel Further Responses To General Form Interrogatories, Employment Form Interrogatories and requests for Production of Documents from defendants State Farm Life Insurance Company and State Farm VP Management Corporation - The court adopts the recommendation of Pro Tem Judge Watson as follows: Granted. Disclosure of the facts and documents regarding Ms. King's employment, whether it be solely by Mr. Weitzen or also by State Farm, is reasonably necessary to permit the parties to fully litigate the nature and legal status of her employment. The assertion of an attorney-client privilege, without a log or other supporting data, does not support the refusal to disclose information or documents. The court adds that State Farm shall produce all responsive documents and a privilege log for all documents where attorney-client privilege is claimed by December 20, 2012. Monetary sanctions are denied. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =302/eg
